data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a 'Damage/cleaning bond' but did not provide any evidence confirming its enforcement or existence in the current saga run. The linked use case mentions a '$500 damage deposit held', but there are no API reads or persisted state checks that explicitly confirm this bond is actively managed or enforced. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence provided to satisfy this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the enforcement or existence of the 'Damage/cleaning bond'.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
